message:
feat(core): add hyperloglog.rs — HyperLogLog++ approximate distinct count (ft-283h4.21)

Implements HyperLogLog++ with configurable precision (p=4..18),
merge support, Jaccard similarity estimation, and linear counting
correction for small cardinalities. 27 proptest properties verify
accuracy bounds, merge semantics, precision scaling, and serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
